race.comment: BODYSNATCHER (4) booted up from the inside draw to lead when returning as favourite last start and was there on straightening before being claimed to finish second at Dalby. Fitter now and will prove tougher to catch this time. SPIRIT OF RIVERTON (2) is a Headwater gelding on debut for the Webster yard. Has trialled well in readiness and keeps Tilley engaged. Drawn sticky but can make a bright start. DRACARIAN (3) was safely held for a midfield finish over the 800m burner at Kilkoy fresh but is better suited here second-up. Can improve sharply. JIGADEE (8) resumes and makes his stable debut for the Richardson camp. Wasn't able to threaten back in NSW but looks to have come on nicely during the break, winning his lead-up trial. Will pay to watch for market support.
